mapper.select: select ea.*, e.name as examName from `exam_announcement` ea left join `exam` e on ea.exam_id = e.id where ea.status = 'published' order by ea.priority desc, ea.id desc
select ea.*, e.name as examName from `exam_announcement` ea left join `exam` e on ea.exam_id = e.id where ea.exam_id = #{examId} order by ea.priority desc, ea.id desc
mapper.insert:
insert into `exam_announcement`
id, title, content, type, priority, exam_id, author_id, author_name, status,
#{id}, #{title}, #{content}, #{type}, #{priority}, #{examId}, #{authorId}, #{authorName}, #{status},
